# Phase-03 — Cloud & Azure Architecture

> Design secure, scalable cloud foundations with Azure as the primary platform.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 11-14**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Cloud Architecture Fundamentals](01_Cloud_Architecture_Fundamentals.prompt.md) | `Cloud_Architecture_Fundamentals.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 02 | [Azure Core Architecture](02_Azure_Core_Architecture.prompt.md) | `Azure_Core_Architecture.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 03 | [Azure Landing Zones](03_Azure_Landing_Zones.prompt.md) | `Azure_Landing_Zones.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 04 | [Azure Networking](04_Azure_Networking.prompt.md) | `Azure_Networking.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 05 | [Azure Compute and Containers](05_Azure_Compute_and_Containers.prompt.md) | `Azure_Compute_and_Containers.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 06 | [Azure Storage Services](06_Azure_Storage_Services.prompt.md) | `Azure_Storage_Services.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 07 | [Azure Well-Architected Framework](07_Azure_Well_Architected_Framework.prompt.md) | `Well_Architected_Framework.md` | 60 min + 3h |
| 08 | [Multi-Cloud and Hybrid Architecture](08_Multi_Cloud_and_Hybrid_Architecture.prompt.md) | `Multi_Cloud_and_Hybrid.md` | 60 min + 3h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
